subject: hedge fund names/ meeting next week

emails.subject: HEDGE FUND NAMES/ meeting next week
emails.subject_base: HEDGE FUND NAMES/ meeting next week
emails.body: HEDGE FUND NAMES/ meeting next week I look forward to meeting with you both on Tuesday. Here's a list of the funds we have in the pipeline and the status: MACRO FUNDS- 1.Harvard (Docs done)- We have been dealing with them in crude, products, and natural gas- we just need to keep track of their credit line. 2. Tudor- we have docs with Ospraie, Tudor Proprietary, Tudor Offshore (Bermuda)- dealing regularly.. 3. Catequil (Negotiating) docs with Offshore and Onshore- waiting for response from Brent and Paul on their latest comments to the ISDA. Confirms from all the deals we have done have been returned to Carol. They are set up in the system; we hold margin. 4. AIG (Negotiating)- Offshore, Onshore- need to get documents out to them- credit work sheet in legal.. still have not gotten out a confirm to them on the trades they have done....we have them set up in the system and hold margin. 5. Union Spring (Negotiating)- Offshore, Onshore- should be done on this one. 6. SAC Capital possibly only one vehicle in Anguila- need to get the document to them- credit work sheet in legal. 7. Quark Power (Negotiating)- 2 entities- Quark Power and Amaranth. Held by Paloma Partners- waiting for their comments on a few points. 8. Valentis and CD Holdings- Held by Wexford Capital need to get document to them- credit work sheet in legal. They want to proceed with the 8 year deal Monday. 9. Global Advisors- trade through Cargill.. Frank Sayre working on POA.. waiting for this back. 10. Argonaut- onshore, offshore vehicles- sending documents.. no credit assessment yet. 11. SOROS- brought through system by credit derivative group.. but need a credit opinion for ENA (to do energy trades). PROGRAM FUNDS- 12. Renaissance credit worksheet in legal- need to get docs to them. 13. Campbell+ Co will likely want to look at a three way transaction between Enron, themselves, and a bank 14. Sunrise Capital getting documentation.

emails.subject: Re: HEDGE FUND NAMES/ meeting next week
emails.subject_base: HEDGE FUND NAMES/ meeting next week
emails.body: Re: HEDGE FUND NAMES/ meeting next week Caroline: Fred wants to meet in the afternoon. Does Tuesday afternoon work for you (after 3 pm)? Sara Shackleton Enron North America Corp. 1400 Smith Street, EB 3801a Houston, Texas 77002 713-853-5620 (phone) 713-646-3490 (fax) sara.shackleton@enron.com Caroline Abramo@ENRON 04/20/2001 03:30 PM

emails.body: was hoping for tuesday morning paul mentioned you were having a hedge fund meeting then... i am flexible... From: Sara Shackleton@ECT on 04/20/2001 03:36 PM

emails.subject: Re: HEDGE FUND NAMES/ meeting next week

emails.body: Fred cannot meet at 10 am Tuesday morning. We will meet at 3pm Tuesday, location TBD. Sara Shackleton Enron North America Corp. 1400 Smith Street, EB 3801a Houston, Texas 77002 713-853-5620 (phone) 713-646-3490 (fax) sara.shackleton@enron.com Caroline Abramo@ENRON 04/20/2001 03:39 PM
